summary: Iteration 34 - v4.8.0 Bug Fixes Testing PASSED. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 AI Guards verified in frontend with working toggles. Bug fixes for Kelly Criterion in LIVE trades, Kelly mode filtering, smart IV estimation, and Greeks fallback warnings all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: Kelly Criterion now works for LIVE trades - executeLiveTrade uses signal.kelly_sizing.suggested_amount to cap maxTrade budget
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: GET /api/position-sizing returns trading_mode field - Kelly stats filtered by current mode (PAPER/LIVE)
BUG FIX 3 VERIFIED: Greeks filter uses smart IV estimation with instrument-specific defaults (NIFTY50=14%, BANKNIFTY=18%, etc.) and OTM volatility smile adjustment
BUG FIX 4 VERIFIED: Code review confirms Greeks filter logs warnings when using fallback spot prices
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/ai-guards/status returns all 8 guards with correct enabled status
REGRESSION PASSED: POST /api/ai-guards/update toggles kelly_sizing and greeks_filter ON/OFF correctly
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/position-sizing returns kelly, suggestion, stats, streak, drawdown, capital_curve with trading_mode
REGRESSION PASSED: POST /api/position-sizing/mode changes to conservative/balanced/aggressive
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/options/greeks returns correct greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega)
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/options/chain-greeks returns 11 strikes around ATM
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/options/iv-analysis returns IV summary
CONFLICT CHECK PASSED: Toggle Kelly OFF - signal generation blocked by Max Daily Loss (expected)
CONFLICT CHECK PASSED: Toggle Greeks OFF - signal generation blocked by Max Daily Loss (expected)
CONFLICT CHECK PASSED: Max Daily Loss guard still blocking (₹5,634 > ₹5,000 limit) - no new trades generated
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4.8.0 bug fixes verified. Key changes: (1) position_sizing.js calculatePositionSize now takes tradingMode param and filters trades by it. (2) signal_generator.js Kelly section passes currentMode to getSignalPositionSize and stores suggested_amount in kelly_sizing. (3) signal_generator.js executeLiveTrade reads signal.kelly_sizing.suggested_amount to cap maxTrade. (4) signal_generator.js Greeks section uses smart IV with instrument defaults and volatility smile. (5) trading.js Kelly stats in AI Guards use currentTradingMode for filtering. App is in LIVE mode with Max Daily Loss BLOCKING (₹5,634 > ₹5,000).

bug_fix_3_smart_iv_estimation.verification: Code review confirms instrument-specific defaults (NIFTY50=14%, BANKNIFTY=18%) and OTM volatility smile adjustment

bug_fix_4_fallback_spot_warnings.description: Greeks filter logs warnings when using fallback spot prices
bug_fix_4_fallback_spot_warnings.verification: Code review confirms console.log warnings for missing live spot data
